title: Synfleece
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Synfleece''' was a material used to make clothing worn by [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]].

{{Clothes-stub}}

==Appearances==

*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
